seo.title: Platform & Product Development Services - DSRC
seo.description: End-to-end platform and product development through agile, scalable teams.

hero.title: PLATFORM & PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT SERVICES
hero.subtitle: Delivering end-to-end platform, and software product engineering services

whyDsrc.title: WHY DSRC FOR PLATFORM & PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT?
whyDsrc.description: At DSRC, we help enterprises innovate, modernize, and scale platforms and products with agility and engineering excellence. Acting as a seamless extension of your team, we deliver solutions that are technically robust, cost-efficient, and aligned with your business strategy.

bottomRow.title: End-to-End Product Development
items: Agile engineering teams integrated with yours
Full lifecycle: design, build, test, deploy

sections.title: Platform Engineering & Architecture
paragraphs: We design and build cloud-native digital platforms and applications that deliver agility, scalability, and seamless integration across enterprise ecosystems — enabling rapid development, deployment, and continuous delivery.
Our teams leverage modern architectural patterns, microservices, API-first design, and DevOps practices to accelerate product launches while minimizing technical debt.
capabilities: Application integration and performance scalability engineering

sections.title: Intelligent Product Development with GenAI & Automation
sections.description: We embed Generative AI and intelligent automation throughout the product lifecycle — from design and development to testing, deployment, and maintenance — driving faster releases, improved quality, and optimized engineering effort.
items: AI-assisted development for productivity, code quality, speed, and maintenance
Intelligent code generation & documentation using AI-based PR reviews, code completion, and refactoring
AI-assisted error prevention with real-time static analysis for logic and security issues
AI-driven testing for automated test generation, defect prediction, and self-healing test management
Predictive analytics for system reliability and proactive maintenance
AI-driven CI/CD automation for intelligent build optimization and self-healing pipelines

engagementModels.title: Engagement Models & Delivery Governance
engagementModels.description: We offer flexible engagement models designed to meet specific client goals — from end-to-end product ownership to scalable team augmentation. All engagements are managed under a mature governance framework ensuring transparency, agile delivery, and consistent quality outcomes.
models: Turnkey Product Development – Full lifecycle responsibility from ideation to deployment and support
Extended Development Teams – Scalable offshore or nearshore teams seamlessly integrated into client environments

items.title: Innovation-First Approach
items.description: Leverage our design-thinking methodology to create unique, market-disruptive software solutions.

items.title: Seamless Team Extension
items.description: Flexible onshore/offshore teams acting as your internal extension.

items.title: End-to-End Delivery
items.description: From strategy and design to engineering, modernization, and lifecycle support.

items.title: Proven Delivery Models
items.description: Hybrid onshore–offshore ensuring quality, cost-efficiency, and 24/7 productivity.

items.title: Agility at Scale
items.description: Rapid adaptation to business priorities with consistent quality.

steps.title: Discovery & Strategy
steps.description: Understand business needs, define vision, scope MVP.

steps.title: MVP Development
steps.description: Rapid prototyping, iterative testing, launch market-ready solutions.

steps.title: Scale & Expand
steps.description: Feature enhancements, architecture strengthening, ecosystem integration.

items.title: Talent Pipeline Management Solution
items.description: Bespoke software solution developing a comprehensive workflow driven, intelligent talent nurturing and pipeline management solution!

items.title: Smart Industry 4.0 Tech Solution
items.description: Solution to capture, analyze and visualize KPIs and perform deep data management and analysis of data from the manufacturing, logistics and utility sectors.

items.title: Industrial IOT Solutions
items.description: Experience delivering custom IOT solutions for a wide spectrum of customers and application domains using Azure and AWS IOT.

cta.title: Accelerate Your Platform & Product Journey
cta.subtitle: Partner with DSRC to design, build, and scale platforms and products that deliver measurable business impact.
